headline: Why Arm Is a Strong Buy Despite the 35% Pullback From Peak Levels
summary: Arm Holdings (NASDAQ:ARM) has been one of 2026’s most dramatic stories, ripping from a January low near $105 to a record $452.70 in June before giving back gains. With shares now near $315, the question is whether the AI CPU thesis still has room to run or if the easy money has already been made. ... Why Arm Is a Strong Buy Despite the 35% Pullback From Peak Levels

headline: Qualcomm (QCOM), Hugging Face Expand Partnership to Accelerate Open AI Development
summary: Qualcomm Inc. (NASDAQ:QCOM) is one of the best NASDAQ stocks to invest in for long term. On June 25, Qualcomm and Hugging Face announced an expanded partnership to accelerate open, developer-driven AI across the entire compute continuum, from edge devices to data center infrastructure. headline: Qualcomm (QCOM), Meta (META) Announce Multi-Generation Data Center CPU Supply Agreement

headline: QUALCOMM INC (NASDAQ:QCOM) Earns Top Spot on Best Dividend Stocks Screener
summary: QCOM offers a sustainable 1.80% dividend yield with 6.56% annual growth, strong profitability ratings, and a low P/E of 14.79, making it a standout dividend stock for income-focused investors.
